name: Buena Vista Park
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: Annual report of the Board of Park Commissioners of San Francisco
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Board of Park Commissioners
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1912 Board of Park Commissioners report requests $25,000 to construct Buena Vista Park's grounds after avenue grading left them well above the sidewalk, and values the 36-acre park at $88,250.

documents.title: General manager's report : Open Space Acquisition and Park Renovation Fund
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Recreation and Park Department,San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of City Planning,San Francisco (Calif.). Open Space Acquisition and Park Renovation Fund
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1975 Open Space fund report allocates $27,000 for children's play apparatus and $100,000 for Phase II rehabilitation and landscaping at Buena Vista Park.

documents.title: Capital plan ... annual update
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Recreation and Park Dept. Capital Improvement Division
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A Recreation and Park capital plan carries a Buena Vista Park master-plan project and recounts the 36-acre park's 1894 founding, 1930s WPA rock walls and a 1989 erosion-control plan.
